title: SIGSEGV with defparam
body:
### Description
When running `verilator --cc --debug --gdbbt` on this program

```verilog
module module_0;
  defparam id_8 =  1, id_9 = 1;
endmodule
```
Verilator throws a SIGSEGV:
`Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.`

### Verilator's version
Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-29-ge3e7b3f2b

### OS Version
WSL2 Ubuntu
